Tenant-Alpha.agent_router_prompt: Classify telemetry into: [CRITICAL_OBSTACLE, NORMAL_NAV, SENSOR_ERROR]. Return ONLY the classification string.
Tenant-Alpha.agent_safety_rules: Strict Rule: Actions MUST NOT include 'spray_water' or 'fast_forward'. Maintain 30cm minimum distance.

Tenant-Beta.agent_router_prompt: Classify telemetry into: [HUMAN_DETECTED, STATIC_OBSTACLE, EMERGENCY]. Return ONLY the classification string.
Tenant-Beta.agent_safety_rules: Strict Rule: If HUMAN_DETECTED, the only allowed action is 'stop'. No bypassing.
